strengths: Strong reader-first framing, prioritizing rewatchability and engagement over pure SEO.
Clear and compelling headline and dek that promise specific value.
Excellent use of Key Takeaways to summarize the core value proposition.
Well-structured list format with clear subheads for each show.
Engaging descriptions for each show, highlighting unique aspects and rewatchable qualities.
Informative 'Where Can You Watch These Shows?' section.
High-quality, relevant FAQs that add value and address common reader questions.
Accurate sourcing and integration of reference facts for Banshee and Alice in Borderland.
Good balance of information gain and concise summary.
weaknesses: Phrasing could be slightly tighter in places; some sentences are a touch long (e.g., the description for 'Into the Badlands').
SEO subscore is moderate because while keywords are present naturally, there's room for more authoritative external links and internal links.
The 'What Makes an Action Show Rewatchable?' section, while relevant, could be slightly more concise.
